steps.t: The ritual stone is south along the Ice Bay among the Angmarim. Reodh Fuil is south east of Sûri-kylä. Jalmari instructed you to throw the feathers in…
Jalmari is at Sûri-kylä on the north eastern edge of the Ice Bay of Forochel. You should return to Jalmari and tell him that you have done as he asked…
